steps.title: Trace the passage structure
steps.content: The text first introduces Maya Brennan as a researcher who studies canopy soil. It then explains what canopy soil is, why it matters in rainforests, and why Brennan is interested in it.

steps.title: Reject invented structures
steps.content: A invents disagreement with an idea. C invents a dispute and resolution. D invents a comparison of tree sizes. The actual structure introduces a researcher and gives information about what she researches. The answer is B.
